title: vigna sinensis var. sesquipedalis
intro: Vigna sinensis var. sesquipedalis, also known as the yardlong bean or Asian bean, is a type of legume native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The yardlong bean is rich in nutrients and offers several health benefits, such as reducing cholesterol levels, regulating blood sugar, and improving cardiovascular health. It can be consumed in various forms, including fresh, cooked, or as an herbal preparation, such as a tea or capsule, which can be found in health food stores or online.
